detaileddescription.para: This page provides detailed documentation for the jet classes used in the ssml_mc20 event.

sect1.title: Jet
sect1.para: The jet class represents a reconstructed jet.

listitem.para: jet(): Initializes the particle type to "jet" and defines the data leaves to be read from the input tree, including b-tagging information. It also sets up a getter for the from_res attribute.
particle_template* clone(): Creates a new instance of the jet particle.
void build(std::map<std::string, particle_template*>* prt, element_t* el): Populates the jet particle's properties from the input data.
void get_from_res(bool* val, jet* el): A static method that determines if the jet originates from a resonant top quark by checking its parent particles.
btag_77, btag_85, btag_90: Boolean flags for different b-tagging working points.
sel_85: A boolean flag for the 85% b-tagging selection.
top_index: The index of the associated truth top quark.
from_res: A boolean flag indicating if the jet originates from a resonance.

sect1.title: Truth Jet
sect1.para: The truthjet class represents a truth-level jet.

listitem.para: truthjet(): Initializes the particle type to "truth_jet" and defines the data leaves.
particle_template* clone(): Creates a new instance of the truthjet particle.
void build(std::map<std::string, particle_template*>* prt, element_t* el): Populates the truthjet particle's properties from the input data.
top_index: The index of the associated truth top quark.
